scope: Model years 1995-2000. Canonical exterior_colors are populated only from complete official model-year charts. Scoped official variant and change claims are retained separately and are never inferred across variants or adjacent years.

publication.title: 1995 Chevrolet Tahoe Vehicle Information Kit
pages: PDF p. 18: 2-door solid and conventional two-tone availability chart
PDF p. 19: 4-door gray-gunmetal two-tone availability chart

years.notes: The chart uses U and L suffixes for Color Code 1 and Color Code 2. Gray, Gunmetal (91L) is listed only as the 4-door secondary color, not as a standalone ZY1 paint.

publication.title: 1996 Chevrolet Tahoe Vehicle Information Kit / 1996 Order Guide
pages: PDF p. 29 / order-guide p. 8: 2-door chart
PDF p. 38 / order-guide p. 17: 4-door chart
publication.publication_date_note: Both chart pages are marked REVISED: 1-29-96.

years.notes: The 2-door and 4-door charts print the same ten ZY1 colors and the same 24 ZY2 pairings. Wheel-flare molding restrictions are outside this color-inventory scope.

years.notes: The latest 12-16-96 charts independently print the same nine ZY1 colors and the same 27 conventional ZY2 combinations for 2-door and 4-door Tahoe. The older PDF p. 28 chart, revised 8-19-96, includes Blue Opal 24U; it is superseded by PDF p. 26 and is intentionally excluded. Gray, Gunmetal 91L appears only as BYP Sport Color Code 2.

two_tone_combinations.source_anomaly: The chart prints secondary label Quicksilver with code 74L.
The chart prints secondary label Quicksilver with code 74L.
The chart prints secondary label Quicksilver with code 55L.

years.notes: The ZY1 charts independently print the same nine standalone colors for 2-door and 4-door Tahoe. The conventional ZY2 tables differ by body style and are preserved separately. The source itself prints Black/Quicksilver with code 74L on both conventional charts and prints 4-door Indigo Blue/Quicksilver with code 55L; these source anomalies are retained rather than silently corrected. Gray, Gunmetal 91L appears only as BYP Sport Color Code 2, and Indigo Blue is not listed in that BYP table.

two_tone_scheme_sources.chart_title: BYP Sport Tahoe 2-Door Interior and Exterior Color Availability Chart - ZY2 Two-Tone Paint with BYP Sport Equipment Package

years.notes: The 2-door and 4-door ZY1 charts independently print the same ten standalone colors, and their conventional ZY2 charts independently print the same 34 pairings. Five (a) restrictions appear only on the 2-door chart and are scoped accordingly. Gray, Gunmetal 91L appears only as BYP Sport Color Code 2. The BYP table prints '(Met)' after Red, Victory and White, Summit, but the controlling ZY1 charts list those standalone colors without the metallic label; the canonical finish follows ZY1.

2000 Chevrolet Tahoe Restoration Kit / Vehicle Information Kit
supporting_sources.publication_note: The official kit corroborates that the carryover Z71 program had four exterior colors but does not name them.

verified_two_tone_claims.claim: Custom Two-Tone paint is also available on LS models in a variety of combinations.

years.color_code_note: None of the controlling 2000 program pages prints paint or RPO codes. Codes remain null rather than being inferred.
years.audit_note: Model year 2000 contained simultaneous redesigned GMT800 and carryover GMT400 programs. The four complete program palettes remain separate and are never flattened into one undifferentiated Tahoe palette. The unenumerated redesigned LS two-tone combinations remain unresolved.
